backend/main.mo: Main actor for the R6 Account Marketplace backend, implementing listings, purchases, vouches, credentials, user profiles, and access control with admin/user role management.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the data migration module that upgrades the actor state from OldActor to NewActor by adding the `adminPrincipal` field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the `claimAdmin` frontend integration feature, linking it to relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, borders, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router setup with routes for marketplace, vouches, and admin pages, wrapping the app in QueryClient and handling auth/profile state in the root layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin settings panel that displays the current admin principal and provides a form to assign the admin role to a new principal via the `useAssignCallerUserRole` mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/Credential: Admin form component for uploading encrypted account credentials and setting the symmetric decryption key via backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ListingsMa: Admin component for managing marketplace listings, supporting add, delete, price update, toggle special deal, and mark-as-sold operations via React Query hooks with a table UI.
frontend/src/components/admin/PurchasesV: Admin read-only view that displays a table of purchase records with status badges and payment method labels, fetched via the useGetPurchasesByBuyer hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/VouchModer: Admin moderation panel for user reviews (vouches), allowing admins to hide/unhide or permanently delete individual vouches via a table interface.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set a display name by calling saveCallerUserProfile on the backend actor, then invalidates the profile query cache.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying the R6 Market brand, navigation links to Marketplace and Reviews, and a caffeine.ai attribution with the current year copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links (including an admin link for admins), and an Internet Identity login/logout button showing the authenticated user's display name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column, passing the onLogout handler to the Header.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/List: Renders a single marketplace listing card showing rank, price, and purchase button, with visual states for sold, featured, and special deal listings.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/Rank: Displays a row of filter buttons for selecting a game rank or 'All Ranks', highlighting the active selection with rank-specific colors and icons.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/Spec: Fetches and renders a highlighted grid section of special-deal listings using ListingCard, showing skeletons while loading and hiding itself when no deals exist.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Credent: Handles secure retrieval and display of purchased account credentials, supporting copy-to-clipboard and enforcing a 5-view limit with appropriate error toasts.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Payment: Renders payment instructions and address/amount details for ICP, BTC, or ETH, then verifies the transaction via the appropriate mutation before advancing the purchase flow.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Purchas: Multi-step modal dialog managing the full purchase flow (payment method selection, payment, credential reveal) with Internet Identity auth gating and a post-purchase vouch prompt.
frontend/src/components/vouch/AverageRat: Displays an aggregate star rating with a numeric average and a per-star distribution bar chart computed from an array of PublicVouch objects.
frontend/src/components/vouch/StarRating: Interactive or read-only 1–5 star rating widget with hover effects, configurable size, and an optional numeric label when in interactive mode.
Renders a single user review card showing the anonymous username, rank badge, star rating, timestamp, and optional review text.
frontend/src/components/vouch/VouchPromp: A modal dialog component that allows users to submit a review/vouch for a purchase, including a star rating, username, and review text, with handling for various backend response states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching the current user's profile, checking admin status, and saving a user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for listings, payment verification (ICP, BTC, ETH), credentials, purchases, vouches, and admin operations against the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS for a dark tactical theme using Tailwind and OKLCH color tokens, including custom utility classes, scrollbar styling, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting helper functions for class merging, ICP formatting, timestamp formatting, purchase ID generation, and rank-related constants (colors, icons, addresses).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and an admin role check, with a claimAdmin bootstrap flow and tabbed management sections for listings, credentials, purchases, vouches, and settings.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Public marketplace page displaying a hero banner, stats bar, special deals section, rank filter, and a paginated listings grid; clicking an available listing opens a PurchaseFlowModal.
frontend/src/pages/VouchesPage.tsx: Public reviews page that fetches and displays verified buyer vouches with an average rating summary and individual VouchCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Rajdhani), an oklch-based color palette (gold, crimson, surface tiers), custom shadows, and shimmer/accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the ICP-based Rainbow Six Siege account marketplace: its 4-canister architecture, security model, payment flows, known issues, and a versioned list of implemented and planned features.
